**Key segment contexts:**
- (circa 1975-1976) Draft of a memorial piece for Tony Boucher. Dick explores Boucher's fear of the universe, his role as a mentor, and the startling claim that his cat Pinky was Boucher's reincarnation.
- (circa 1975-1976) Dick identifies the pineal gland as the "third eye" and the biological receptor for the "Other Sun" (Sun of Righteousness). He links this to the 1974 chromatic phosphene experience and argues that ...
- (circa 1975-1976) Dick synthesizes the "Light Body" and "Re-entry" theories: the Holy Spirit is a collective "Light Creature" (The Fellowship of Christ) that re-enters history through the pineal gland. He concludes ...

**Related terms:** Acts (related), Advent (related), After (related), Again (related), Although (related)

evidence.text:
Handwritten notes in PKD’s hand: A Light struck meadow for Tony Hiss & the Real World. Hark! Each tree its silence breaks – Nicholas Brody 1692

When I met Theodore Surgeon, who wrote MORE THAN HUMAN, this good man said to me right off, “What sort of universe is it that causes a man like Tony Boucher to die of cancer?” I had been wondering the same thing ever since Tony Boucher died. So had Ted Sturgeon, although he didn’t expect me to give an answer. He just wanted to show me what he – Ted Stur

Needs Review
68
The conduit is the optic nerve, the eye the receptor percept organs, but the message is to the pineal body, not the brain. Generally, photon light messages travel to brain-reception; but as the Psy Today article shows, some are "intended" for the pineal body (springtime).

One could speculate that this is the purpose of human beings: Why We Are Here -- to serve as the recipient "female" "mothers" for the implantations of the solar spermatika, the divine seeds. Curiously, this wou

My vision in 2 75 was, then, of what is formally called "Salvation." Hence I kept seeing Santa Sophia (Christ, the Logos). Also, just as I saw grape vines twined around the little saint, I realize that my vision of the dancing king in the furrows in spring is a metamorphosis of the little saint: thin, like him, and pale and gentle; it is his spirit, I guess. Which would be why I would conceive of the king dancing to the dythramb; after all, I had already seen the vines twined around the little s

I believe something really evil was loose in the world, and we stood up to it here and there and defeated it. I have no idea who or what it was, no clear conception of it or what it wanted. Or why me. Perhaps what I did was shake off a lifetime of contamination and conditioning and preprogramming to this world. That in effect I confuted or renounced it and my allegiance to the forces in it and hence to it. What isn't clear is whether I sh

All the Protestant had inately (sp) was his conscience. Innately, I mean. Conscience -- individual and inner, and his own, not derived. But now! Whole categories of human thought innate, inner and individual, in the same way -- conscience elaborated or added to -- multiplex systems instead of the single system of conscience, which told us only what was right, not what was so. This illustrates maybe what the Catholics say, that God (as Jesus) did not step down into this world and became a man but rather somehow drew man up to Him (to His world or realm).

It may be that because of my "transubstantiated" state in 3 74, everything I did possessed or seemed to possess the quality of ritual, of solemn enactment or even re-enactment. Everything was transfigured into archetypal modes. However, I still have the feeling that I had been waiting for that letter

241
I remembered how it was before the Fall.. a racial memory? In 3-74 my exile ended, not by my returning up there, but by Him coming down here (as into the stagnant ocean). Recall my dream about.the little boy Philip, on the raft, approaching England (San Francisco, it looked like), a sort of changling who got past Scotland Yard, which is to say the authorities... and then rose up stage by stage but then revealed himself as he was: the coocoo egg. They could not tell until it hatched...and the

263
-6-

It is interesting how the insertion of my actual dream into TEARS exemplifies the joining of two items by St. Sophia, since in my own life the dream when I dreamed it had nothing to do with my society or the extension-into-visibility of it which I had already laid out in the novel. But juxtiposed, they made their historic (apocalyptic) point. I think now that there is a certain justice in conferring the 3-74 experience/visions on the author of TEARS; justice and appropriate
